title: Under Secretary of State Sarah B. Rogers on dismantling the "Censorship Industrial Complex"
description:
(0:00) Jason and Sacks welcome Sarah B. Rogers!

(2:22) Free speech, EU censorship, OSA/DSA overreach?

(13:44) Censorship on mass migration policies, major fines against US companies, the DSA as a "censorship tariff"

(22:59) AI deepfakes, giving freedom the benefit of the doubt, Biden-era censorship

(34:42) Understanding the "Censorship Industrial Complex" in America

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses free speech and censorship with Under Secretary of State Sarah B. Rogers, covering topics like EU censorship, AI deepfakes, and the 'Censorship Industrial Complex'. They also touch on the DSA as a 'censorship tariff' and Biden-era censorship. The conversation revolves around the importance of giving freedom the benefit of the doubt.

takeaways.text: The DSA can be seen as a 'censorship tariff'
AI deepfakes pose a threat to free speech
The 'Censorship Industrial Complex' is a concern in America
Biden-era censorship is a topic of discussion
Giving freedom the benefit of the doubt is crucial
Major fines against US companies for censorship non-compliance

sentiment.notes: The mood is cautious due to the discussion of censorship and its potential impact on free speech. The hosts and guest express concern about the 'Censorship Industrial Complex' and its implications.

notable_moments.description: Introduction of Under Secretary of State Sarah B. Rogers
Discussion of the 'Censorship Industrial Complex' in America
